title: Charming Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials, adding a Charming Moon that increases spawn rates of allays, vexes, witches, and magical ores!
body:
During the Charming Moon event, you may notice the spirits of the forest are out twice as much as normal. This magical night inspires allays, vexes, witches, and frogs to come out in higher amounts. Due to the increase in spiritual energy, all magical ores, including amethyst, lapis lazuli, and redstone will produce double the amount. During the very rare Super Charming Moon event, the effects will be quadrupled. You will also recieve Regeneration III, due to the magic in the air.

All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to the original author CorgiTaco.

Credit as well to Draconic Archer for making many other add-ons for Enhanced Celestials!
